component.name: Emutastic
component.summary: Beautiful retro game library and emulation frontend

description.p: Emutastic is a polished library manager and frontend for retro game emulation, built on the libretro ecosystem. Import your legally-owned game backups, and Emutastic identifies them, fetches box art and metadata, and presents your collection as a beautiful, browsable library.

ul.li: Library management with box art, metadata, video previews, collections and favorites
One-click play across dozens of classic consoles (cores download on demand)
Save states with thumbnails, screenshots, cheats, per-game notes and manuals
RetroAchievements: unlocks, hardcore mode, leaderboards, friends and challenge indicators
In-game overlay: shaders (built-in + the libretro pack), bezels, turbo buttons, recording
ROM hack soft-patching (IPS/BPS/UPS), cloud save sync, in-app updates

description.p: Emutastic does not include any games, BIOS files, or copyrighted system software.
Selection indicators, Delete-key removal, DS screen layouts, achievement challenge indicators, and a round of wiring fixes.
The in-game menu grows up: shaders, bezels, turbo buttons, Vectrex overlays, displayed-resolution screenshots, per-game window memory.
